Title: User Registration
Test Data:
- Valid username: testuser
- Valid password: testpassword
- Valid email: testuser@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the valid username, password, and email.
3. Click the "Register" button.
4. Verify that the user is successfully registered and redirected to the login page.
Expected Result: The user is registered and can log in with the provided credentials.

Title: User Login
Test Data:
- Valid username: testuser
- Valid password: testpassword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid username and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
4. Verify that the user is successfully logged in and redirected to the user dashboard.
Expected Result: The user is logged in and can access their dashboard.

Title: User Logout
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user dashboard.
2. Click the "Logout" button.
3. Verify that the user is successfully logged out and redirected to the login page.
Expected Result: The user is logged out and cannot access their dashboard.

Title: User Information Update
Test Data:
- New username: newtestuser
- New email: newtestuser@example.com
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user dashboard.
2. Click the "Edit Profile" button.
3. Update the username and email.
4. Click the "Save Changes" button.
5. Verify that the user information is successfully updated.
Expected Result: The user information is updated, and the user can see the new information on their dashboard.

Title: User Filtering
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the user list page.
2. Enter the filter value and click the "Filter" button.
3. Verify that only the user with the specified username is displayed.
Expected Result: The user list is filtered correctly based on the provided filter value.

Title: Invalid User Registration
Test Data:
- Invalid username: test
- Invalid password: pass
- Invalid email: test.com
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the invalid username, password, and email.
3. Click the "Register" button.
4. Verify that an error message is displayed, and the user is not registered.
Expected Result: The user registration fails due to invalid input.

Title: Empty User Registration
Test Data:
- Empty username
- Empty password
- Empty email
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Leave all fields empty.
3. Click the "Register" button.
4. Verify that an error message is displayed, and the user is not registered.
Expected Result: The user registration fails due to empty input.
